keywords.name: account
keywords.description: Set the user account name in the SMTP settings. For example, me@mycompany.com . This is the account information fo logging into your email account. This information is stored for this user on this computer.

keywords.name: to
keywords.description: Add an item to the email. Add the file s as an attachment. Add a “bcc” recipient. Add a “cc” recipient. Add a “to” recipient.

keywords.name: string
keywords.description: Set the email body. Set the message body by importing s . Set the message body to s .

keywords.name: clear
keywords.description: Clear the current mail variables, including body, recipient list and attachment list.

keywords.name: domain
keywords.description: Set the company domain name. For example, smtp.mycompany.com or 192.197.32.6 . This information is stored for this user on this computer.

keywords.name: from
keywords.description: Set the address corresponding to the email account. In many cases this is the same information as the account login information (given with the account keyword); in those cases the from address does not need to be specified.

keywords.name: host
keywords.description: Set the SMTP host name. For example, mycompany.com . This information is stored for this user on this computer.

keywords.name: password
keywords.description: Set the user password for the email account. A special prompt will be given, without normal keyboard echo. This information is encrypted and stored for this user on this computer.

keywords.name: port
keywords.description: Set the SMTP port. The default value is 25. This information is stored for this user on this computer.

keywords.name: to
keywords.description: Remove an item from the email. Remove the attached file s . Remove a “bcc” recipient. Remove a “cc” recipient. Remove a “to” recipient.

keywords.name: send
keywords.description: Validate the mail settings, compose the message, and send the message.

keywords.name: subject
keywords.description: Set the message subject.
